steps.question:
WHO ARE YOU
SHOPPING FOR?
steps.description: We will tailor recommendations based on your role in the Marine Corps community.

options.label: Active Duty Marine
options.description: Currently serving, with needs across duty, training, and off-duty life.

options.label: Veteran / Retiree
options.description: Honorably served and shopping for quality gear at tax-free prices.

options.label: Military Family
options.description: Spouse, dependent, or family member of an authorized patron.

options.label: DoD / Civilian
options.description: Department of Defense civilian employee or authorized patron.

options.label: Reserve / Guard
options.description: Reserve component Marine or National Guard member.

options.label: Shopping for a Gift
options.description: Finding the right gift for a Marine or military family member.

steps.question:
WHAT'S YOUR
DAY-TO-DAY LIFE?
steps.description: Tell us about your typical week so we can match you with the right gear for every situation.

options.label: Active Duty / Training
options.description: In uniform most days with regular PT and field ops.

options.label: Office / Admin
options.description: Desk work, meetings, and a professional daily environment.

options.label: Active / Athletic
options.description: Gym, PT, runs, and outdoor training throughout the week.

options.label: Family / Home Life
options.description: Kids, household routines, and casual everyday errands.

options.label: Outdoors / Tactical
options.description: Camping, hiking, hunting, and outdoor sports.

options.label: Social / Casual
options.description: Going out, casual meetups, and weekend activities.

options.label: Frequent Travel / PCS
options.description: Often on the move and looking for versatile, durable gear.

options.label: Work From Home
options.description: Remote work that needs comfort without looking sloppy.

steps.question:
WHAT DO YOU
NEED MOST?
steps.description: Pick your top clothing and footwear priorities.

options.label: Military Uniforms
options.description: MARPAT, dress blues, and service uniform essentials.

options.label: PT / Athletic Gear
options.description: Running shoes, compression, shorts, and training layers.

options.label: Casual / Everyday
options.description: T-shirts, jeans, hoodies, and sneakers for off duty.

options.label: Tactical / Work
options.description: TDUs, cargo pants, and tactical boots for hard use.

options.label: Outerwear
options.description: Jackets, fleece, rain gear, and layering pieces.

options.label: Footwear
options.description: Boots, running shoes, dress shoes, and all-weather pairs.

steps.question:
WHAT'S YOUR
PERSONAL STYLE?
steps.description: Pick the vibe that best describes how you like to look when you are off duty.

options.label: Tactical Edge
options.description: Utility pockets, earth tones, and functional details.

options.label: Athletic Performance
options.description: Compression fits, bold color pops, and brand-forward gear.

options.label: Streetwear / Casual
options.description: Relaxed fits, graphic tees, and modern everyday looks.

options.label: Smart Casual
options.description: Polished basics that still feel easy and approachable.

options.label: Outdoor / Rugged
options.description: Durable layers, trail boots, and field-tested textures.

options.label: Clean / Minimalist
options.description: Neutral colors, simple silhouettes, and sharp basics.

steps.question:
HOW DO YOU
LIKE YOUR FIT?
steps.description: Clothing fit matters. We will only prioritize products that match your preferred silhouette.

options.label: Slim / Athletic Fit
options.description: Tapered and body-following for training and athletic builds.

options.label: Regular / Classic Fit
options.description: Comfortable and versatile without going too loose.

options.label: Relaxed / Loose Fit
options.description: Extra room for comfort, movement, and casual wear.

steps.question:
WHAT'S YOUR
BUDGET RANGE?
steps.description: We will prioritize the best value in your range. Tax-free shopping means you are already ahead of retail.

options.label: Under $50
options.description: Great basics, deals, and clearance finds.
Mid-range quality staples and brand-name gear.
Premium performance gear and dependable footwear.

options.label: $300+ No Limit
options.description: Top-of-the-line products, tactical kits, and best-in-class gear.

steps.question:
WHICH BRANDS
DO YOU LOVE?
steps.description: We will prioritize your favorites or introduce you to adjacent brands worth trying.

options.label: Under Armour
options.description: Performance and tactical gear.

options.label: Brooks
options.description: Premium running shoes.

options.label: 5.11 Tactical
options.description: Tactical clothing and hard-use gear.

options.label: Danner
options.description: Premium tactical boots.

options.label: The North Face
options.description: Outdoor layers and cold-weather protection.

options.label: Oakley SI
options.description: Tactical eyewear and apparel.

options.label: Propper
options.description: Military uniform specialists.

options.label: Sorel
options.description: All-weather boots and footwear.

categories.title: PT & Training Gear
categories.description: High-performance athletic wear built for Marine Corps PT standards: compression, moisture-wicking layers, and reliable running shoes.

categories.title: Uniform & Duty Wear
categories.description: Inspection-ready uniforms, BDUs, and authorized service items at MCX pricing.

categories.title: Everyday Casual
categories.description: Off-duty comfort with tactical credibility: hoodies, polos, casual pants, and easy layering pieces.

categories.title: Outdoor & Rugged
categories.description: Weather-ready gear, field layers, and dependable boots for weekends outside the wire.

bundles.title: Complete PT Kit
bundles.description: HeatGear shirt, Brooks Ghost 16, training shorts, and socks. Everything you need for your next PFT.

bundles.title: Field Ready Kit
bundles.description: TDU pants, uniform coat, and tactical boots for a durable, mission-ready setup.

bundles.title: Weekend Transit Kit
bundles.description: Layered casual staples with easy packability for long drives, flights, and PCS weekends.
